name: Kahlua Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
3. Beat egg whites until frothy, then beat in sugar until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
4. Cream butter and brown sugar until fluffy.
5. Beat in egg yolks one at a time.
6. Sift flour, cocoa, and baking soda together; add to creamed mixture alternately with coffee and Kahlua and blend well.
7. Fold egg whites into batter.
8. Pour batter into prepared pans.
9. Bake 30-35 minutes or until done.
10. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then invert on wire racks; remove from pans. Cool before frosting.
11. Serves 10-12.
KAHLUA FROSTING
1. In a large bowl, cream butter and powdered sugar.
2. Add cocoa powder, Kahlua, and hot coffee; beat until smooth.
